popularStory.headline: Immigration story
popularStory.description: Deacon Richard Butler had first settled in Cambridge, Massachusetts, but was a follower of Rev. Thomas Hooker and emigrated with him to Hartford, Connecticut.  Thomas Hooker is known as the father of …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Butler於1610年9月10日出生在英國艾可布萊崔時，他的父親Stephen Butler35歲，母親Sarah Elliott29歲。他和Hannah Banbury至少有1個女兒。他於1636年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德。他去世於1684年8月4日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德享年73歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德費爾斯特 邱奇 本 克里斯蒂。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Butler于1610年9月10日出生在英国艾可布萊崔时，他的父亲Stephen Butler35岁，母亲Sarah Elliott29岁。他和Hannah Banbury至少有1个女儿。他于1636年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德。他去世于1684年8月4日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德享年73岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德費爾斯特 邱奇 本 克里斯蒂。

nameMeanings.name: Butler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a word that originally denoted a wine steward, usually the chief servant of a medieval household, from Norman French butuiller (Old French bouteillier, Latin buticularius, from buticula ‘bottle’). In the large households of royalty and the most powerful nobility, the title came to denote an officer of high rank and responsibility, only nominally concerned with the supply of wine, if at all. As well as being widespread in England, this is also the surname of an important Irish family, descended from Theobald FitzWalter, who was appointed Chief Butler of Ireland by King Henry II in 1177. It is Gaelicized as de Buitléir.

English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English boteler ‘maker of bottles (usually of leather)’, a derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bo(u)teille ‘bottle’ and synonymous with Botelmaker.
Americanized form of French   Bouthillier   (see   Bouteiller  ).

variants.name: Buttler
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Butler  .
German: occupational name for a village tavern owner, from French bouteillier ‘butler’.
Americanized form of German Buttlar: habitational name from a place so named in Thuringia.

variants.name: Bouthillier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Jacques, Normand, Philippe, Yves.
French: variant of   Bouteiller  . This name is sometimes Americanized as   Butler  . Compare   Boutilier  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Butler was born on 10 September 1610, in Braintree, Essex, England, his father, Stephen Butler, was 35 and his mother, Sarah Elliott, was 29. He had at least 1 daughter with Hannah Banbury. He lived in Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America in 1636. He died on 4 August 1684, in Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 73, and was buried in First Church of Christ, Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Butlerが1610年9月10日にイギリスエセックスブレイントレで生まれた時，父Stephen Butlerは35歳，母Sarah Elliottは29歳であった。彼はHannah Banburyとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1636年にはイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードに住んでいた。彼は1684年8月4日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードハートフォードで73歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードハートフォードフィルスト チャーチ オフ チリストにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Butler(이)가 1610년 9월 10일 영국 에세스 브레이트리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Stephen Butler(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Elliott(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Hannah Banbury(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1636년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드에서 살았다. 그는 1684년 8월 4일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하트퍼드에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하트퍼드 피르스트 처르치 프 크리스트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Butler nasceu em 10 de setembro de 1610, em Braintree, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Stephen Butler, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Elliott, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Hannah Banbury. Ele viveu em Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America em 1636. Ele faleceu em 4 de agosto de 1684, em Hartford, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em First Church of Christ, Hartford, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Butler родился 10 сентября 1610 г. в местности бреинтри, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Stephen Butler было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Elliott, 29. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Hannah Banbury. Он жил в местности хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1636 году. Он умер 4 августа 1684 г. в местности хартфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности фирст чурч оф краист, хартфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Butler nació el 10 de septiembre de 1610, en Braintree, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Stephen Butler, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Sarah Elliott, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Hannah Banbury. Vivió en Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America en 1636. Murió el 4 de agosto de 1684, en Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en First Church of Christ, Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
